nasb.text: For David says of Him, ‘I saw the Lord always in my presence; For He is at my right hand, so that I will not be shaken.

esv.text: For David says concerning him, “‘I saw the Lord always before me, for he is at my right hand that I may not be shaken;

cnv.text: 大衛指著他說： ‘我時常看見主在我面前， 因他在我右邊，我必不會動搖。

ccb.text: 论到耶稣，大卫曾说， “‘我看见主常在我面前， 祂在我右边，我必不动摇。

csbs.text: 事实上，大卫指着他说： ‘我常常看见主在我面前； 因他在我的右边， 我就不至于摇动。
